_meta.purpose: Curated EVIC (Enterprise Value Including Cash) + revenue reference table for PCAF Financed Emissions attribution (R3 gap A-4). This is the second tier in the engine's EVIC resolution order: (1) live feed [data/evicData.json via evicService.js, currently empty] -> (2) this file -> (3) sector-median proxy, only within a plausibility ceiling, else a blocking data-gap flag on that position.
_meta.howToUpdate: Replace a null evic_usd_bn/revenue_usd_m and its 'source' string with a real, dated, citable figure (e.g. 'Bloomberg terminal, 2026-06-30' or 'Company 10-K FY2025'). Do not guess a plausible-looking number — an honest null is safer than an unverified one for a PCAF disclosure figure.
_meta.warning: Every entry below is currently UNVERIFIED — the evic_usd_bn values were carried over as-is from this module's pre-existing hardcoded demo dataset (BASE_POSITIONS), not independently confirmed against a real source. They are populated (non-null) only so the module keeps functioning; treat every row as needing analyst review, not as already-correct.
